'''dochalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberoid|rubberoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberoid|rubberoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochalithi|dochalithi]] || [[word:dochaliji|dochaliji]] || [[word:dochalishi|dochalishi]] || [[word:dochaliki|dochaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochaluthuthu|dochaluthuthu]] || [[word:dochalujuju|dochalujuju]] || [[word:dochalushushu|dochalushushu]] || [[word:dochalukuku|dochalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochaluthu|dochaluthu]] || [[word:dochaluju|dochaluju]] || [[word:dochalushu|dochalushu]] || [[word:dochaluku|dochaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochalufthuf|dochalufthuf]] || [[word:dochalufjuf|dochalufjuf]] || [[word:dochalufshuf|dochalufshuf]] || [[word:dochalufkuf|dochalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochalethe|dochalethe]] || [[word:dochaleje|dochaleje]] || [[word:dochaleshe|dochaleshe]] || [[word:dochaleke|dochaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochalothotho|dochalothotho]] || [[word:dochalojojo|dochalojojo]] || [[word:dochaloshosho|dochaloshosho]] || [[word:dochalokoko|dochalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochalotho|dochalotho]] || [[word:dochalojo|dochalojo]] || [[word:dochalosho|dochalosho]] || [[word:dochaloko|dochaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochalofthof|dochalofthof]] || [[word:dochalofjof|dochalofjof]] || [[word:dochalofshof|dochalofshof]] || [[word:dochalofkof|dochalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochalïfthïf|dochalïfthïf]] || [[word:dochalïfjïf|dochalïfjïf]] || [[word:dochalïfshïf|dochalïfshïf]] || [[word:dochalïfkïf|dochalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochalïfthïfthïf|dochalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dochalïfjïfjïf|dochalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dochalïfshïfshïf|dochalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dochalïfkïfkïf|dochalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochalïfthïf|dochalïfthïf]] || [[word:dochalïfjïf|dochalïfjïf]] || [[word:dochalïfshïf|dochalïfshïf]] || [[word:dochalïfkïf|dochalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochalïfthïf|dochalïfthïf]] || [[word:dochalïfjïf|dochalïfjïf]] || [[word:dochalïfshïf|dochalïfshïf]] || [[word:dochalïfkïf|dochalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochalæthæ|dochalæthæ]] || [[word:dochalæjæ|dochalæjæ]] || [[word:dochalæshæ|dochalæshæ]] || [[word:dochalækæ|dochalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochalathatha|dochalathatha]] || [[word:dochalajaja|dochalajaja]] || [[word:dochalashasha|dochalashasha]] || [[word:dochalakaka|dochalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochalatha|dochalatha]] || [[word:dochalaja|dochalaja]] || [[word:dochalasha|dochalasha]] || [[word:dochalaka|dochalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochalafthaf|dochalafthaf]] || [[word:dochalafjaf|dochalafjaf]] || [[word:dochalafshaf|dochalafshaf]] || [[word:dochalafkaf|dochalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochalasha|dochalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochalshësha|dochalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochalrosha|dochalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochalmusha|dochalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochalyasha|dochalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochalnkshësha|godochalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochalnkrosha|godochalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochalnkmusha|godochalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochalnkyasha|godochalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachalasha|dochachalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachalshësha|dochachalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachalrosha|dochachalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachalmusha|dochachalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachalyasha|dochachalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachalnkshësha|godochachalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachalnkrosha|godochachalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachalnkmusha|godochachalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachalnkyasha|godochachalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechælasha|dechælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechælshësha|dechælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechælrosha|dechælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechælmusha|dechælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechælyasha|dechælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechælnkshësha|godechælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechælnkrosha|godechælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechælnkmusha|godechælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechælnkyasha|godechælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfalasha|dochfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfalshësha|dochfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfalrosha|dochfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfalmusha|dochfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfalyasha|dochfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfalnkshësha|godochfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfalnkrosha|godochfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfalnkmusha|godochfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfalnkyasha|godochfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
